response.justification: Bogdan meets the minimum 15 years of engineering experience requirement and possesses the preferred entrepreneurial background, alongside recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and cloud technologies. However, his profile leans heavily toward hands-on Staff-level development rather than the Director-level strategic advisory, deep AI/ML product innovation, and recognized AI expertise expected for this Principal AI Strategy role.
strengths: Over 15 years of diverse software, infrastructure, and full-stack engineering experience.
Strong entrepreneurial background as a founder and active open-source contributor.
Proven track record of inspiring others internally and externally through workshops, talks, and community leadership.
concerns: Lacks recognized, Director-level expertise in AI strategy and enterprise cloud advisory.
AI experience appears limited to recent tooling and integrations rather than deep, foundational AI/ML product development.
Does not hold the preferred Master's or PhD in an AI-related field.
